subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, sent down in truth from the heaven of exalted glory, and God hath made them a testimony unto them that dwell in the dominion of His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله نزلت بالحق من سماء عز علیا و جعلها الله حجه لمن فی جبروت الامر و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
